name: /plugin-install dry-run lists the planned clone, validate, test, and register actions without actually performing any of them
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/example --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'planned: gh clone acme/example' out.txt && grep -q 'planned: validate plugin.yaml' out.txt && grep -q 'planned: run rule-tester' out.txt && grep -q 'planned: register namespaced rule ids' out.txt && grep -q 'cloned=false' out.txt && grep -q 'registered=false' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
